features.title: AI Assistant Overview
features.description: Understand Ask Alleato — the multi-agent AI system with C-Suite advisors embedded in the platform.

features.title: AI Capabilities Index
features.description: Every AI feature in Alleato OS — what it does, where to find it, and what to ask.

features.title: AI Memory
features.description: View and manage the facts, preferences, and context the AI assistant remembers about you across sessions.

features.title: Ask the AI About Finances
features.description: Use the CFO advisor to analyze budgets, margins, cash flow, change order exposure, and live ERP data from Acumatica.

features.title: Ask the AI About Meetings
features.description: How the AI assistant uses meeting transcripts, action items, and decisions from Fireflies to answer questions about project activity.

features.title: Ask the AI Assistant for Help
features.description: Use Ask Alleato when you need help finding information or understanding how to use the platform.

features.title: Get a Project Briefing from the AI
features.description: Ask the AI for a status update on any project and it pulls from meetings, emails, Teams messages, financials, and schedule simultaneously.

features.title: Self-Learning Intelligence Architecture
features.description: Internal implementation blueprint for Alleato AI feedback loops, promotion rules, retrieval scoring, and packet-first learning.

features.title: What the AI Assistant Can Do (Actions)
features.description: The AI assistant can create and update records directly from chat — learn which actions are available and how the confirmation flow works.

features.title: Understand Feature Status
features.description: Learn how Alleato PM distinguishes live, partial, planned, blocked, and deprecated app behavior.

features.title: Navigate Alleato PM
features.description: Understand project pages, global tools, admin areas, and how Ask Alleato should point you to the right place.
